case_title: EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT LLC VS. ALEX MCKENZIE ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MCKENZIE, ALEX

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCKENZIE, ALEX THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 690 LONGBRIDGE STREET #0910, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94158, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
